signatureMove.name: Encroaching Roots
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee then it cannot take a Jog action until end of turn.

abilities.name: Woodspirit
abilities.description: This character may Jog over Wooded Patches. Friendly Treefolk within 12" ignore Wooded Patches and other friendly Treefolk for determining cover when using Arcane Abilities.

abilities.name: We are Ruwt
abilities.description: Each time this character would be slain it may instead drop any Moonstones as if it were slain and restore its health rounding up if it can be placed within a Wooded Patch created earlier this game. Doing this removes the Wooded Patch.

abilities.name: New Growth
abilities.description: When this character uses an Arcane Ability it may suffer 3 Wds instead of paying the energy cost. If this reduces it to 0 Wds the Arcane Ability is cancelled. Once per turn.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Place a 50mm Diameter Wooded Patch within 3" and LoS on open ground. This remains in place until end of game. A maximum of 3 Wooded Patches may be placed by this troupe; if a fourth is placed you must choose and remove a Wooded Patch created earlier this game.
